statement: The Stueckelberg coupling IS effective: starting with all energy in the scalar chains and the gauge phase cold, E_phi grows from exactly 0 to a peak fraction ~57% of the total (the two coupled wave sectors drive toward equipartition). The DRIVE RATE dE_phi/dt climbs steeply with the chain steepness, from 4.4e-02 at rho=1 to 1.0e+01 at rho=50 (grows) -- the same phase-reaches-pi nonlinearity as DBI2. Above rho_pi~18 the transferred fraction falls (17% at rho=50) as the scalar sector turns ill-posed (DBI3). Energy flows scalar -> gauge; whether it nucleates a kink is G3.
